blocks.value:
flowchart TD
  A[Authenticate] --> R[Resolve resource]
  R --> M[Membership]
  M --> P[Role/permission]
  P --> B[Ban/restriction]
  B --> S[Policy]
  S --> V[Runtime validation]
  V --> L[Limits]
  L --> T[Transaction/audit/scoped realtime]
  A -. failure .-> D[Stable safe error]
  P -. failure .-> D
  V -. failure .-> D

rows: Server role checks + owner invariant + audit

blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  D[Detect] --> T[Triage/evidence]
  T --> C[Contain]
  C --> F[Fix root cause]
  F --> R[Restore/verify]
  R --> P[Post-incident tests/docs]

text.ru: Каждый числовой лимит должен браться из текущего runtime/config/tests и сопровождаться применимостью версии. Документация не дублирует изменяемые значения без generated token или source link.
text.en: Every numeric limit must come from current runtime/config/tests and carry version applicability. Documentation does not duplicate mutable values without a generated token or source link.

rows.ru: Rate limits
rows.en: Rate limits

rows.ru: Server bucket/config
rows.en: Server bucket/config

rows.ru: Проверить abuse, bucket and clock; не отключать защиту для обхода симптома.
rows.en: Check abuse, bucket and clock; do not disable the control to hide the symptom.

rows.ru: Uploads/media
rows.en: Uploads/media

rows.en: Actual bytes, detected MIME, room policy and quota

rows.en: Stable validation/policy/quota error; temp data removed

rows.ru: Проверить storage, policy and actual file; не доверять client metadata.
rows.en: Check storage, policy and actual file; do not trust client metadata.

rows.ru: Trust/MLS inventory
rows.en: Trust/MLS inventory

rows.ru: Current v4 source/tests
rows.en: Current v4 source/tests

rows.ru: Stable device/KeyPackage/rate conflict
rows.en: Stable device/KeyPackage/rate conflict

rows.ru: Проверить active devices, scope, expiry and maintenance cleanup.
rows.en: Check active devices, scope, expiry and maintenance cleanup.

rows.ru: Room/Pulse operations
rows.en: Room/Pulse operations

rows.ru: Server role/policy/ledger transaction
rows.en: Server role/policy/ledger transaction

rows.ru: Permission, conflict or idempotent prior result
rows.en: Permission, conflict or idempotent prior result

rows.ru: Проверить membership, ban, role, idempotency key and audit.
rows.en: Check membership, ban, role, idempotency key and audit.

caption.ru: Limits/errors · Client, integration and operator decision tree.
caption.en: Limits/errors · Client, integration and operator decision tree.

text.ru: Повтор без idempotency, игнорирование Retry-After или client-only suppression не гарантируют безопасное восстановление. Stack, SQL, cookies, tokens and private payloads не должны попадать в user-facing errors или логи.
text.en: Retry without idempotency, ignoring Retry-After or client-only suppression do not guarantee safe recovery. Stacks, SQL, cookies, tokens and private payloads must not appear in user-facing errors or logs.

caption.ru: API overview · End-to-end authenticated request lifecycle.
caption.en: API overview · End-to-end authenticated request lifecycle.

blocks.value:
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Client/Integrator
  participant G as HTTP/Origin/CSRF boundary
  participant A as Auth and scope
  participant D as Domain service
  participant S as Storage/audit/realtime
  C->>G: method + path + session/device/idempotency
  G->>A: validated origin/CSRF/requestId
  A->>D: authenticated actor + resource scope
  D->>D: role, ban, policy, validation, limits
  D->>S: transaction
  S-->>D: authoritative state + audit/event
  D-->>C: stable response/error + requestId

rows.ru: Session/bearer form defined by current route; never inferred from UI visibility.
rows.en: Session/bearer form defined by current route; never inferred from UI visibility.

rows.ru: Unauthenticated request returns stable 401 without internal details.
rows.en: Unauthenticated request returns stable 401 without internal details.

rows.ru: Exact allowed Origin and CSRF for cookie-authenticated browser mutations.
rows.en: Exact allowed Origin and CSRF for cookie-authenticated browser mutations.

rows.ru: Cross-origin or missing token mutation fails closed.
rows.en: Cross-origin or missing token mutation fails closed.

rows.ru: Trust/MLS v4 actions require the applicable active verified device context.
rows.en: Trust/MLS v4 actions require the applicable active verified device context.

rows.ru: Revoked/wrong-user device cannot call or receive scoped events.
rows.en: Revoked/wrong-user device cannot call or receive scoped events.

rows.ru: Use a stable Idempotency-Key for purchase and other documented replay-sensitive mutations.
rows.en: Use a stable Idempotency-Key for purchase and other documented replay-sensitive mutations.

rows.ru: Repeated identical request returns the prior authoritative result without duplicate side effect.
rows.en: Repeated identical request returns the prior authoritative result without duplicate side effect.

rows.ru: HTTP + stable code + safe message + requestId; Retry-After where applicable.
rows.en: HTTP + stable code + safe message + requestId; Retry-After where applicable.

rows.ru: Client displays safe action; operator logs code/requestId only, with redaction.
rows.en: Client displays safe action; operator logs code/requestId only, with redaction.

text.ru: Generated route/event inventory и runtime validation остаются authoritative. Curated examples объясняют контракт, но не заменяют source/tests при расхождении.
text.en: The generated route/event inventory and runtime validation remain authoritative. Curated examples explain the contract but do not replace source/tests when they diverge.
